column1: create_statement

CREATE TABLE activity_logs (
  id UUID NOT NULL DEFAULT uuid_generate_v4(),
  organization_id UUID NOT NULL,
  user_id UUID,
  member_id UUID,
  action_type VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
  action_description TEXT NOT NULL,
  entity_type VARCHAR(50),
  entity_id UUID,
  ip_address VARCHAR(45),
  user_agent TEXT,
  changes JSONB,
  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now()
);

CREATE TABLE ai_voice_notes (
  id UUID NOT NULL DEFAULT uuid_generate_v4(),
  organization_id UUID NOT NULL,
  member_id UUID NOT NULL,
  recorded_by_user_id UUID NOT NULL,
  audio_url TEXT,
  transcription TEXT,
  summary TEXT,
  urgency_level USER-DEFINED NOT NULL,
  category USER-DEFINED,
  status USER-DEFINED DEFAULT 'open'::voice_note_status,
  assigned_to_user_id UUID,
  is_private BOOLEAN DEFAULT true,
  followup_date DATE,
  resolved_at TIMESTAMPTZ,
  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now(),
  updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now(),
  deleted_at TIMESTAMPTZ
);

CREATE TABLE branches (
  id UUID NOT NULL DEFAULT uuid_generate_v4(),
  organization_id UUID NOT NULL,
  name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  location VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  address TEXT,
  city VARCHAR(100),
  state VARCHAR(100),
  zip_code VARCHAR(20),
  phone_number VARCHAR(50),
  email VARCHAR(255),
  pastor_id UUID,
  capacity INTEGER,
  established_date DATE,
  is_active BOOLEAN DEFAULT true,
  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now(),
  updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now(),
  deleted_at TIMESTAMPTZ
);

CREATE TABLE custom_fields (
  id UUID NOT NULL DEFAULT uuid_generate_v4(),
  organization_id UUID NOT NULL,
  field_name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  field_key VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  field_type USER-DEFINED NOT NULL,
  applies_to USER-DEFINED NOT NULL,
  is_required BOOLEAN DEFAULT false,
  placeholder VARCHAR(255),
  default_value TEXT,
  options JSONB,
  validation_rules JSONB,
  display_order INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
  is_active BOOLEAN DEFAULT true,
  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now(),
  updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now(),
  deleted_at TIMESTAMPTZ
);

CREATE TABLE event_attendance (
  id UUID NOT NULL DEFAULT uuid_generate_v4(),
  event_id UUID NOT NULL,
  member_id UUID NOT NULL,
  check_in_time TIMESTAMPTZ,
  check_out_time TIMESTAMPTZ,
  attendance_status USER-DEFINED NOT NULL DEFAULT 'present'::attendance_status,
  marked_by_user_id UUID,
  scan_method USER-DEFINED,
  notes TEXT,
  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now(),
  updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now(),
  deleted_at TIMESTAMPTZ
);

CREATE TABLE event_types (
  id UUID NOT NULL DEFAULT uuid_generate_v4(),
  organization_id UUID,
  name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  emoji VARCHAR(10),
  color VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
  is_default BOOLEAN DEFAULT false,
  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now(),
  updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now(),
  deleted_at TIMESTAMPTZ
);

CREATE TABLE events (
  id UUID NOT NULL DEFAULT uuid_generate_v4(),
  organization_id UUID NOT NULL,
  branch_id UUID NOT NULL,
  title VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  description TEXT,
  event_type_id UUID,
  date DATE NOT NULL,
  start_time TIME WITHOUT TIME ZONE NOT NULL,
  end_time TIME WITHOUT TIME ZONE,
  location VARCHAR(255),
  group_id UUID,
  created_by_user_id UUID NOT NULL,
  max_attendees INTEGER,
  registration_required BOOLEAN DEFAULT false,
  is_recurring BOOLEAN DEFAULT false,
  recurrence_pattern VARCHAR(100),
  image_url TEXT,
  review_link TEXT,
  custom_fields JSONB DEFAULT '{}'::jsonb,
  is_published BOOLEAN DEFAULT true,
  is_cancelled BOOLEAN DEFAULT false,
  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now(),
  updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now(),
  deleted_at TIMESTAMPTZ
);

CREATE TABLE family_groups (
  id UUID NOT NULL DEFAULT uuid_generate_v4(),
  organization_id UUID NOT NULL,
  family_name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  head_of_household_id UUID,
  branch_id UUID NOT NULL,
  address TEXT NOT NULL,
  phone_number VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
  email VARCHAR(255),
  joined_date DATE NOT NULL,
  notes TEXT,
  is_active BOOLEAN DEFAULT true,
  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now(),
  updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now(),
  deleted_at TIMESTAMPTZ
);

CREATE TABLE group_members (
  id UUID NOT NULL DEFAULT uuid_generate_v4(),
  group_id UUID NOT NULL,
  member_id UUID NOT NULL,
  joined_date DATE NOT NULL,
  role VARCHAR(100),
  is_active BOOLEAN DEFAULT true,
  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now(),
  updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now(),
  deleted_at TIMESTAMPTZ,
  branch_id UUID NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE groups (
  id UUID NOT NULL DEFAULT uuid_generate_v4(),
  organization_id UUID NOT NULL,
  branch_id UUID NOT NULL,
  name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  type USER-DEFINED NOT NULL,
  tag VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
  description TEXT,
  leader_id UUID,
  parent_group_id UUID,
  meeting_schedule VARCHAR(255),
  meeting_location VARCHAR(255),
  max_members INTEGER,
  join_link TEXT,
  public_view_link TEXT,
  qr_code_join TEXT,
  qr_code_public TEXT,
  is_active BOOLEAN DEFAULT true,
  is_public BOOLEAN DEFAULT false,
  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now(),
  updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now(),
  deleted_at TIMESTAMPTZ
);

CREATE TABLE join_requests (
  id UUID NOT NULL DEFAULT uuid_generate_v4(),
  group_id UUID NOT NULL,
  member_id UUID NOT NULL,
  request_message TEXT,
  status USER-DEFINED DEFAULT 'pending'::request_status,
  reviewed_by_user_id UUID,
  reviewed_at TIMESTAMPTZ,
  rejection_reason TEXT,
  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now(),
  updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now(),
  deleted_at TIMESTAMPTZ
);

CREATE TABLE member_notes (
  id UUID NOT NULL DEFAULT uuid_generate_v4(),
  organization_id UUID NOT NULL,
  member_id UUID NOT NULL,
  created_by_user_id UUID NOT NULL,
  content TEXT,
  audio_url TEXT,
  audio_duration INTEGER,
  note_type USER-DEFINED DEFAULT 'general'::note_type,
  is_private BOOLEAN DEFAULT false,
  tags ARRAY DEFAULT '{}'::character varying[],
  is_pinned BOOLEAN DEFAULT false,
  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now(),
  updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now(),
  deleted_at TIMESTAMPTZ
);

CREATE TABLE member_registration_links (
  id UUID NOT NULL DEFAULT uuid_generate_v4(),
  organization_id UUID NOT NULL,
  branch_id UUID,
  group_id UUID,
  unique_code VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  registration_url TEXT NOT NULL,
  qr_code_url TEXT,
  created_by_user_id UUID NOT NULL,
  max_uses INTEGER,
  usage_count INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
  expires_at TIMESTAMPTZ,
  is_active BOOLEAN DEFAULT true,
  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now(),
  updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now(),
  deleted_at TIMESTAMPTZ
);

CREATE TABLE member_registration_requests (
  id UUID NOT NULL DEFAULT uuid_generate_v4(),
  organization_id UUID NOT NULL,
  registration_link_id UUID,
  full_name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  email VARCHAR(255),
  phone_number VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
  date_of_birth DATE,
  address TEXT,
  occupation VARCHAR(255),
  emergency_contact_name VARCHAR(255),
  emergency_contact_phone VARCHAR(50),
  preferred_branch_id UUID,
  form_data JSONB DEFAULT '{}'::jsonb,
  status USER-DEFINED DEFAULT 'pending'::request_status,
  reviewed_by_user_id UUID,
  reviewed_at TIMESTAMPTZ,
  rejection_reason TEXT,
  converted_member_id UUID,
  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now(),
  updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now(),
  deleted_at TIMESTAMPTZ
);

CREATE TABLE members (
  id UUID NOT NULL DEFAULT uuid_generate_v4(),
  organization_id UUID NOT NULL,
  member_number VARCHAR(50),
  profile_image TEXT,
  email VARCHAR(255),
  phone_number VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
  alternate_phone VARCHAR(50),
  emergency_contact_name VARCHAR(255),
  emergency_contact_phone VARCHAR(50),
  date_of_birth DATE,
  gender USER-DEFINED,
  marital_status USER-DEFINED,
  branch_id UUID NOT NULL,
  family_group_id UUID,
  relationship_in_family VARCHAR(50),
  address TEXT,
  city VARCHAR(100),
  state VARCHAR(100),
  zip_code VARCHAR(20),
  occupation VARCHAR(255),
  employer VARCHAR(255),
  join_date DATE NOT NULL,
  baptism_date DATE,
  membership_status USER-DEFINED NOT NULL DEFAULT 'active'::membership_status,
  last_attendance_date DATE,
  attendance_rate NUMERIC DEFAULT 0.00,
  total_attendance_count INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
  custom_fields JSONB DEFAULT '{}'::jsonb,
  notes TEXT,
  is_active BOOLEAN DEFAULT true,
  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now(),
  updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now(),
  deleted_at TIMESTAMPTZ,
  first_name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  last_name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE message_recipients (
  id UUID NOT NULL DEFAULT uuid_generate_v4(),
  message_id UUID NOT NULL,
  member_id UUID NOT NULL,
  delivery_status USER-DEFINED DEFAULT 'pending'::delivery_status,
  delivered_at TIMESTAMPTZ,
  opened_at TIMESTAMPTZ,
  clicked_at TIMESTAMPTZ,
  error_message TEXT,
  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now(),
  updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now(),
  deleted_at TIMESTAMPTZ,
  branch_id UUID
);

CREATE TABLE messages (
  id UUID NOT NULL DEFAULT uuid_generate_v4(),
  organization_id UUID NOT NULL,
  sent_by_user_id UUID NOT NULL,
  subject VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  content TEXT NOT NULL,
  message_type USER-DEFINED NOT NULL,
  target_type USER-DEFINED NOT NULL,
  target_branch_id UUID,
  target_group_id UUID,
  excluded_member_ids ARRAY DEFAULT '{}'::uuid[],
  scheduled_send_at TIMESTAMPTZ,
  sent_at TIMESTAMPTZ,
  status USER-DEFINED DEFAULT 'draft'::message_status,
  total_recipients INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
  delivered_count INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
  opened_count INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
  clicked_count INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now(),
  updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now(),
  deleted_at TIMESTAMPTZ
);

CREATE TABLE notifications (
  id UUID NOT NULL DEFAULT uuid_generate_v4(),
  organization_id UUID NOT NULL,
  user_id UUID NOT NULL,
  title VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  message TEXT NOT NULL,
  type USER-DEFINED NOT NULL,
  action_url TEXT,
  icon VARCHAR(50),
  is_read BOOLEAN DEFAULT false,
  read_at TIMESTAMPTZ,
  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now(),
  updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now(),
  deleted_at TIMESTAMPTZ
);

CREATE TABLE organizations (
  id UUID NOT NULL DEFAULT uuid_generate_v4(),
  name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  slug VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  logo_url TEXT,
  primary_contact_name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  primary_contact_email VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  primary_contact_phone VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
  address TEXT,
  city VARCHAR(100),
  state VARCHAR(100),
  zip_code VARCHAR(20),
  country VARCHAR(100) DEFAULT 'USA'::character varying,
  subscription_plan USER-DEFINED NOT NULL DEFAULT 'free'::subscription_plan,
  subscription_status USER-DEFINED NOT NULL DEFAULT 'trial'::subscription_status,
  monthly_revenue NUMERIC DEFAULT 0.00,
  trial_ends_at TIMESTAMPTZ,
  subscription_starts_at TIMESTAMPTZ,
  subscription_ends_at TIMESTAMPTZ,
  max_members INTEGER DEFAULT 100,
  max_branches INTEGER DEFAULT 1,
  settings JSONB DEFAULT '{}'::jsonb,
  is_active BOOLEAN DEFAULT true,
  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now(),
  updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now(),
  deleted_at TIMESTAMPTZ
);

CREATE TABLE password_reset_tokens (
  id UUID NOT NULL DEFAULT uuid_generate_v4(),
  user_id UUID NOT NULL,
  token VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  expires_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL,
  used_at TIMESTAMPTZ,
  ip_address VARCHAR(45),
  user_agent TEXT,
  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now()
);

CREATE TABLE permissions (
  id UUID NOT NULL DEFAULT uuid_generate_v4(),
  name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  slug VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  description TEXT,
  category VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now(),
  updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now(),
  deleted_at TIMESTAMPTZ
);

CREATE TABLE role_permissions (
  id UUID NOT NULL DEFAULT uuid_generate_v4(),
  role_id UUID NOT NULL,
  permission_id UUID NOT NULL,
  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now(),
  updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now(),
  deleted_at TIMESTAMPTZ
);

CREATE TABLE roles (
  id UUID NOT NULL DEFAULT uuid_generate_v4(),
  organization_id UUID,
  name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  slug VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  description TEXT,
  color VARCHAR(50) DEFAULT '#6b7280'::character varying,
  is_system_role BOOLEAN DEFAULT false,
  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now(),
  updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now(),
  deleted_at TIMESTAMPTZ
);

CREATE TABLE subscription_plans (
  id UUID NOT NULL DEFAULT uuid_generate_v4(),
  plan_name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  plan_slug VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL,
  description TEXT,
  price_monthly NUMERIC NOT NULL,
  price_yearly NUMERIC NOT NULL,
  max_members INTEGER NOT NULL,
  max_branches INTEGER NOT NULL,
  max_groups INTEGER NOT NULL,
  max_storage_gb INTEGER NOT NULL,
  features JSONB DEFAULT '{}'::jsonb,
  is_active BOOLEAN DEFAULT true,
  display_order INTEGER DEFAULT 0,
  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now(),
  updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now(),
  deleted_at TIMESTAMPTZ
);

CREATE TABLE user_sessions (
  id UUID NOT NULL DEFAULT uuid_generate_v4(),
  user_id UUID NOT NULL,
  organization_id UUID NOT NULL,
  session_token VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  refresh_token VARCHAR(255),
  ip_address VARCHAR(45),
  user_agent TEXT,
  device_type VARCHAR(50),
  browser VARCHAR(100),
  os VARCHAR(100),
  country VARCHAR(100),
  city VARCHAR(100),
  is_active BOOLEAN DEFAULT true,
  last_activity_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now(),
  expires_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL,
  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now(),
  updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now()
);

CREATE TABLE users (
  id UUID NOT NULL DEFAULT uuid_generate_v4(),
  organization_id UUID NOT NULL,
  auth_user_id UUID,
  email VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  profile_image TEXT,
  phone_number VARCHAR(50),
  role_id UUID,
  assigned_branch_ids ARRAY DEFAULT '{}'::uuid[],
  assigned_group_ids ARRAY DEFAULT '{}'::uuid[],
  is_super_admin BOOLEAN DEFAULT false,
  is_active BOOLEAN DEFAULT true,
  last_login_at TIMESTAMPTZ,
  email_verified_at TIMESTAMPTZ,
  two_factor_enabled BOOLEAN DEFAULT false,
  two_factor_secret VARCHAR(255),
  created_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now(),
  updated_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now(),
  deleted_at TIMESTAMPTZ,
  first_name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  last_name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL
);
